contatti.title: Contact
contatti.subtitle: Have something to say? Write to us.
contatti.successMessage: Your voice has been heard. We will respond if necessary.
contatti.errorFillFields: Please fill in all required fields.
contatti.errorSendFailed: Unable to send message. Please try again later.

index.subtitle: An explorable threshold
index.descriptionFallback: A room that opens in the meadow, an archive that breathes, a threshold where the cavapendoli show themselves only briefly.
index.mysticalOpening1: The Cavapendoli descend in a spiral, almost swift.
index.mysticalOpening2: They were once everywhere, in the warehouses of the intangible world.
index.mysticalOpening3: Slowly, over time, they took shape.
index.mysticalOpening4: First images, then paintings, then words.
index.mysticalOpening5: But they didn't like to be fixed in place.
index.mysticalOpening6: As time passed, they accepted being exposed to the gaze of strangers.
index.mysticalOpening7: Now they hesitate, perhaps they don't want to be stopped on paper.
index.mysticalOpening8: They slip away, because they live in freedom.
index.mysticalOpening9: They are benign, hilarious, slippery and witty.
index.mysticalOpening10: They come and go, flutter about, land and leave.
index.mysticalOpening11: Who knows what they do when they're not showing themselves.
index.mysticalOpening12: I invite them with humility to enter the barrel of the pen...

preload.title: Preparing the world.
preload.description: Progressive loading of the globe, painted surfaces, and sound environment. Entry starts only when the first frame is stable.

mobileOrientation.title: Rotate to landscape.
mobileOrientation.description: The outer globe and twin-stick controls are designed for landscape. In portrait you can continue, but you'll lose space, vision, and comfort.

deposit.leftIn: A cavapendolata has been left at {{siteId}}.

offri.title: Offer
offri.subtitle: Leave something for the cavapendoli.
offri.submittedLine1: Your cavapendolata is waiting to enter.
offri.submittedLine2: It will be visible in the Archive after passing through the Antechamber.

grazie.title: Thank you
grazie.line1: Your cavapendolata is making its way.
grazie.line2: It will cross the Antechamber before entering the Archive.

wizard.step2HintNoExplain: It doesn't need to explain everything.

wizard.step4NamePlaceholder: what you want to be called
wizard.consentRights: This content is mine, or I can share it.
wizard.consentArchive: It's fine if it enters the Archive, after the Antechamber.
wizard.consentReshare: If necessary, it can be reshared in the project channels.
